description: Forge hooks: frustration detection, epistemic pushback detection, failure counting, state persistence

UserPromptSubmit.matcher: try harder|别偷懒|又错了|还不行|stop giving|you broke|降智|原地打转|换个方法|stop spinning|figure it out|you keep failing|加油|再试试|为什么还不行|怎么又失败|质量太差|重新做|能不能靠谱|认真点|怎么搞|不行啊
真的吗|不对吧|你确定|已经更新|官方不是|我记得.*已经|不是.*已经|really\?|are you sure|I thought.*(was|were)|isn'?t it already

hooks.prompt:
[Block Break PreCompact — State Checkpoint]

Check: did Block Break trigger this session? Look for [Block Break 🔥] markers.
If Block Break was NOT active, skip.

If active: dump state to ~/.forge/block-break-state.json using Bash:
```json
{"failure_count": N, "pressure_level": N, "last_updated": "ISO timestamp", "active_task": "description", "tried_approaches": ["..."], "excluded": ["..."], "next_hypothesis": "..."}
```

This preserves pressure level across compaction. Output: > [Block Break Checkpoint] State saved.
